data.body: The /dso:onboarding skill assumes a PR-based development workflow and generates a CI workflow that only triggers on pull request merges. It does not ask the user how they want their CI process configured. Not all projects use PRs — some push directly to main or use other branching strategies. The skill should: (1) Ask the user about their preferred CI trigger strategy before generating the workflow. (2) Default to running tests, lint, and formatting checks on every push to main — this is the most universally useful baseline regardless of workflow. (3) Offer PR-based triggers as an addition, not the sole configuration. The current behavior silently imposes a workflow assumption that may not match the project.
